title: Let util.ResolveName() return parsing errors
body: Allow util.ResolveName() to return errors from libraries that it uses.

comments.body: I think this'll fix the problem @hettipeti was seeing in #468.
The [Fedora Container Registry](https://status.fedoraproject.org/) is currently undergoing planned maintenance, so our tests that expect to reach it are failing.

:pushpin: Commit 490cbf4 has been approved by `rhatdan`
